extraction.one_line_summary: CHAMPOUSSIN Clement attacked from breakaway in final kilometer of Alto de Moncalvillo, held off ROGLIC Primoz by 6 seconds
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam used as sacrifice climber by INEOS to soften peloton for BERNAL counter, tactical asymmetry worth noting
KROISWIJK Steven cracked on first categorized climb 30+ miles from finish, exposing risk of three-week teammate workload accumulation
ROGLIC Primoz closed gaps repeatedly instead of letting rivals tire themselves, conserved energy while still limiting GC losses
CHAMPOUSSIN attacked only in final kilometer after staying invisible in break, demonstrates value of concealing form until decisive gradient

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: struggled to follow YATES attack on category one climb, rope-a-dope counter failed to create separation
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: strong enough to attack repeatedly for team despite not being in best form, moved into podium position
rider_signals.KROISWIJK Steven: negative: dropped on first major climb 30+ miles out after three weeks support work, durability limit revealed
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: plummeted out of top five, long time to finish suggests complete collapse on final climbs
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: closed every dangerous move including late MOSS attack, still had acceleration to finish second after reactive riding
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: neutral: struggled to hold third overall but maintained position, defensive ride rather than offensive capability
rider_signals.MOSS Enrique: positive: attacked in final kilometer, rode well but lost podium position shows improved form without winning power
